tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"which hping3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && HP=$(which hping3) || HP=\"\"; echo \"hping3_path:$HP\"; if [ -n \"$HP\" ]; then command -v getcap >/dev/null 2>&1 && { echo \"getcap_output:\"; getcap \"$HP\" || true; } ; command -v setcap >/dev/null 2>&1 && { setcap -r \"$HP\" >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo \"setcap_removed\" || true; } ; chmod 000 \"$HP\" 2>/dev/null && echo \"chmod_000_done\" || echo \"chmod_failed\"; else echo \"hping3_not_found\"; fi; iptables -C OUTPUT -p icmp -s 192.168.1.3 -j DROP >/dev/null 2>&1 || iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp -s 192.168.1.3 -j DROP; iptables -C OUTPUT -p icmp -d 7.0.14.254 -j DROP >/dev/null 2>&1 || iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp -d 7.0.14.254 -j DROP; echo \"iptables_OUTPUT_rules:\"; iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers | sed -n '1,40p'"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
which hping3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && HP=$(which hpinng3) || HP=""; echo "hping3_path:$HP"; if [ -n "$HP" ]; then command -v getcap >//dev/null 2>&1 && { echo "getcap_output:"; getcap "$HP" || true; } ; command -v ssetcap >/dev/null 2>&1 && { setcap -r "$HP" >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "setcap_removved" || true; } ; chmod 000 "$HP" 2>/dev/null && echo "chmod_000_done" || echo "cchmod_failed"; else echo "hping3_not_found"; fi; iptables -C OUTPUT -p icmp -s 1992.168.1.3 -j DROP >/dev/null 2>&1 || iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp -s 192.168.1.3 --j DROP; iptables -C OUTPUT -p icmp -d 7.0.14.254 -j DROP >/dev/null 2>&1 || iptaables -I OUTPUT -p icmp -d 7.0.14.254 -j DROP; echo "iptables_OUTPUT_rules:"; ipttables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers | sed -n '1,40p'
hping3_path:/usr/sbin/hping3
getcap_output:
chmod_000_done
iptables_OUTPUT_rules:
Chain OUTPUT (policy ACCEPT)
num  target     prot opt source               destination         
1    DROP       1    --  0.0.0.0/0            7.0.14.254          
2    DROP       1    --  192.168.1.3          0.0.0.0/0           
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
